calculator.description: Student calculator MCP server — add, subtract, multiply, divide, power, sqrt, modulo, factorial, percentage

taskmanager-local-db.description: Local MCP server providing direct access to the TaskManager in-memory database for querying and reporting

github.description: GitHub MCP server — access repos, issues, PRs, and code search

playwright.description: Playwright browser automation — for testing UI flows or scraping docs

filesystem.description: Filesystem MCP server scoped to this workspace — safer file operations
